name: terminull
description: Terminull — a local, consent-shaped control panel for your CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex). `npx terminull setup` injects a fully reversible hook harness; `terminull eject` removes it byte-for-byte.
//: PUBLIC product entry (M10 D1). `terminull` = packages/cli, bundled at pack time by tsup: every @terminull/* workspace import is INLINED into dist-pack/, so the ONLY runtime deps are node-pty (native), ws, zod. prepack writes exclusively under packages/cli gitignored dirs — the workspace stays git-clean after `npm pack` (gate f). Workspace deps below are devDependencies because they are bundled, not shipped as deps.
